required_preferences.fact: Prepares exclusively gluten-free lunches each week — avoids all foods containing gluten during support shifts, including fast food and previous meal prep staples

supersedes.fact: Sticks to meal-prepped lunches on weekdays — never grabs fast food during support shifts

required_preferences.fact: Shortens or occasionally skips hourly screen breaks when admin audits and customer logs must be completed after-hours — prioritizes compliance with new post-shift security protocols over break routine

supersedes.fact: Takes a 10-minute screen break every hour, regardless of workload — refuses to skip breaks even for urgent customer issues

required_preferences.fact: Prefers brief catch-up phone calls with her brother once a month, focused on family updates rather than caregiving logistics
Organizes the monthly family Zoom calls herself, sending the calendar invites — never delegates to someone else
Schedules 20 minutes each evening exclusively for post-shift admin compliance (audit logs) before closing out her work laptop; avoids family and leisure interruptions during this window
Walks her dog daily in the local park between support shifts — never skips regardless of weather

persona: A remote customer service representative for a subscription-based software startup
